title: The Marines Are Coming
writer: James Gruen, John Rathmell, Colbert Clark
actors: William Haines, Esther Ralston, Conrad Nagel
plot: When Lt. "Wild Bill" Traynor, bad boy of the Marine Corps, arrives at a San Diego Marine Base, he is surprised to discover he has been assigned to duty under his old rival, Captain Benton (Conrad Nagel). While eluding the advances...
